intro: Traceability: who downloaded which DEP/receipt export, period, and channel. Size is estimated from receipt/closing counts, not measured wire bytes.

table.empty: No export downloads for the current filters.

export.truncatedNotice: Results were capped — CSV may be incomplete (see X-Fiscal-Audit-Export-Truncated).

retention.title: Retention (Austria / RKSV practice)
retention.body: Receipt and export-related audit events must be kept for at least 7 years (statutory retention in a business context). Technical deletion/retention jobs must not expire these records early; align with backup and archive policy.
